name: Chicken and Sausage Gumbo
recipeIngredient: 14 ounces Ff smoked sausage, sliced into 1/4 inch pieces
18 ounces Chicken breast halves without skin or bone
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large pan, cook the flour over medium heat until it turns a light caramel color and forms a paste, stirring frequently for about 15 minutes.
2. Add the chicken pieces to the pan and brown them on all sides. Remove the chicken from the pan and set aside.
3. Add oil to the pan, then sauté the celery, green pepper, and onion until they are softened.
4. Sprinkle in the flour mixture and stir well.
5. Gradually add water, stirring constantly until smooth.
6. Return the chicken to the pan and stir in the garlic, bay leaf, Cajun seasoning, thyme, Worcestershire sauce, hot sauce, and green onions.
7. Reduce heat to low and simmer for 1 hour.
8. Serve the gumbo over cooked rice.
